privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic silent auction task with exactly 20 items. Key verified facts: 300-second timeout, 25 max steps, medium difficulty, English language. Data structure: Item ID, Name, Starting Bid, Reserve Price, 5 bid slots (columns E,G,I,K,M) with corresponding bidder IDs (F,H,J,L,N). Bid formatting intentionally messy: 10 items have $ symbols, 3 have plain numbers, 5 have mixed formats, 2 have no bids. Reserve prices range $50-$400 (avg $148). Expected outcomes from generated data: 9 items SOLD, 9 NOT SOLD, 2 NO BIDS, total revenue $1685. Verifier checks 6 criteria (Highest Bid ≥95%, Winners ≥90%, Status ≥95%, Final Price, Columns Present, Summary Stats ≥2/4). Pass threshold: ≥70% of 6 criteria. All data is 100% synthetic, created by setup_task.sh.
